name: cos-monitors
description: Cognitive OS background monitors — agent bus health, system health, crash recovery. Replaces SessionStart-launched daemons with managed plugin monitors.

monitors.name: agent-bus-monitor
monitors.description: Watches agent-bus state files for stuck agents, dead handlers, and queue backlogs.

monitors.name: cognitive-os-health
monitors.description: Periodic health check — Engram reachability, hook dispatcher pulse, settings.json validity.

monitors.name: crash-recovery
monitors.description: Watches for orphaned PID files and stale session state from killed/crashed agents.
